originalTitle: Alphabet’s stock is set to join the Dow, pivoting index’s industrial roots toward tech
summary: As Alphabet rolls out more data centers — and borrowing money to do it — it can be argued that it is becoming more of an industrial company, says strategist
content: As Alphabet rolls out more data centers — and borrowing money to do it — it can be argued that it is becoming more of an industrial company, says strategist
chineseTitle: Alphabet 的股票将加入道指，将指数的工业根基转向科技股
chineseSummary: 策略师表示，随着 Alphabet 推出更多数据中心并借钱来实现这一目标，可以说它正在变得更像一家工业公司
chineseContent: 策略师表示，随着 Alphabet 推出更多数据中心并借钱来实现这一目标，可以说它正在变得更像一家工业公司
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
